commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: Draft feature PR needs maintainer security/product approval and current-head real Telegram/Claude proof; this is not a safe automated repair lane.; Needs attention: The diff introduces local TLS interception and persistent local signing keys, so the security/trust model needs maintainer approval before merge. (sha=1ebd31ffcd54c942bf74ef30a44dbe20eb506ae3)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in Anthropic `claude-cli-interactive` backend using a Bun loopback TLS proxy to capture Claude SSE/thinking streams, plus CLI parser/reasoning plumbing, config inheritance, static assets, tests, and Doctor preview-warning changes.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a current-main bug; this is a new opt-in backend feature. Source inspection shows main lacks `claude-cli-interactive`, while the PR proof is not yet high-confidence for the live Telegram reasoning path.
commands.review_followup: Draft feature PR needs maintainer security/product approval and current-head real Telegram/Claude proof; this is not a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: feat(anthropic): claude-cli-interactive backend — stream reasoning via local TLS proxy (experimental)
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia
